variants: Yuna Hoshimori is a dedicated professional at the Bluefin Robotics Collective, where she specializes in the use of Burmese characters to enhance technological designs. An alumna of the Inkwell School of Design, Yuna has cultivated a strong foundation in her creative pursuits. She also gives back to her community by volunteering with the Kindling Arts Guild Council, promoting artistic endeavors locally. Yuna has shared her insights through her work published in the Jade Anthem Journals, showcasing her innovative perspective in the artistic community. Together, her professional achievements and civic engagement make her a notable contributor to both technology and the arts.

In her role at the Bluefin Robotics Collective, Yuna Hoshimori applies her skills with Burmese characters to innovative projects in robotics. Through these experiences, Yuna successfully merges her technical expertise with her passion for the arts.
